narrative:
Granville Township C (precinct in Licking County) has 1,471 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
